hero.title: Journey Through Vietnamese Craft Heritage
hero.subtitle: Discover the rustic beauty and cultural essence preserved for thousands of generations across Vietnamese craft villages.

featured.title: Featured Craft Villages
featured.subtitle: Historic villages preserving national cultural identity through exquisite traditional artistry

howItWorks.title: How to Experience HoaLang
howItWorks.subtitle: Four simple steps to immerse yourself in Vietnamese cultural heritage
howItWorks.step1Desc: Search and discover traditional craft villages on our interactive map.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Utilize artificial intelligence to optimize your route and customized travel plans.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Book hands-on workshops to craft ceramics or weave silk alongside local artisans.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Support and purchase exquisite, authentic handicrafts directly from makers.

cta.title: Ready for Your Cultural Quest?
cta.subtitle: Let HoaLang accompany you on the breathtaking paths of Vietnamese heritage.
